stories.headline: Bitcoin loses $77K as Hormuz standoff lifts oil to 3-week high
stories.tldr: Bitcoin slid below $77,000 and ether and Solana followed lower as the closed Strait of Hormuz pushed oil to its highest level in three weeks.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The geopolitical-driven oil spike resurrects inflation fears the Fed is trying to tame, capping crypto's risk-on bid right as Powell heads into his final FOMC.
the_details: BTC opened at $77,368 Tuesday, down 1.6%, then slipped to $76,472 by 7:10am ET as ETH dropped to $2,278.
Brent crude pushed past $100 with the Strait of Hormuz closed; U.S.–Iran negotiations remain stalled.
Coinbase premium index turned negative and BTC futures open interest fell 1% to $120 billion in 24 hours.

stories.headline: Industry pours hundreds of millions into Aave rescue plan after Kelp hack
stories.tldr: Crypto leaders are funding a hundreds-of-millions rescue for Aave users left exposed by the $292M KelpDAO bridge exploit, the largest hit of 2026.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A coordinated industry bailout signals DeFi is willing to backstop systemic shocks itself, but it also confirms how much exposure leveraged restaking has buried inside lending markets.
the_details: KelpDAO's rsETH bridge was drained for $292M on April 18 via a LayerZero single-point-of-failure exploit.
Aave users carrying rsETH collateral became the largest downstream victims, prompting the rescue facility.
DefiLlama clocks April losses at $606M across 18 days — 3.7x all of Q1 2026 — with Lazarus Group fingered.

stories.headline: Powell's last FOMC: markets price 94.8% hold before Warsh takes over May 15
stories.tldr: Traders give a 94.8% probability the Fed leaves rates unchanged Wednesday in what is likely Jerome Powell's final FOMC, with Kevin Warsh sworn in May 15.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A hawkish hold from a lame-duck Powell sets the tone for crypto into the Warsh era, where the market is already betting on a more dovish framework — or a messy regime change.
the_details: CME FedWatch shows 94.8% odds of no change at the April 28-29 meeting; oil and weak Michigan sentiment cloud cuts ahead.
DOJ recently closed its probe into Powell, lifting near-term rate-cut odds further out the curve.
Crypto fund AUM hit $155B last week — the highest since February 1 — heading into the decision.

stories.headline: Goldman Sachs files for its first in-house Bitcoin ETF product
stories.tldr: Goldman Sachs filed earlier this month for its first proprietary spot Bitcoin ETF, joining the wave of TradFi giants stamping their own brand onto crypto wrappers.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A house-branded Goldman BTC ETF ends the era of Wall Street merely distributing other issuers' funds — it's a direct challenge to BlackRock's IBIT for institutional flows.
the_details: Filing comes as crypto fund AUM swelled to $155B, the highest level since February 1, 2026.
Goldman joins a packed 2026 ETF lineup with regulators waving through filings under SEC Chair Atkins.
Spot BTC and ETH ETFs collectively pulled in $31B of net inflows during 2025, per The Block data.

stories.headline: Thailand's KBank deploys Ripple's Palisade wallet under $4B crypto push
stories.tldr: Thailand's KBank is rolling out Palisade, the wallet software Ripple acquired as part of its $4 billion crypto-investment spree, marking a marquee Asian bank integration.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A top-tier Thai bank standardizing on Ripple infrastructure is a real-world stress test for institutional self-custody — and a quiet expansion of XRP's enterprise moat.
the_details: KBank is among Thailand's largest commercial banks; Palisade powers wallet provisioning and key management.
Ripple has now committed $4B in crypto-related investments and acquisitions over the cycle.
Deal lands as Asian banks face MAS, HKMA and BoT pressure to formalize digital-asset custody stacks.
